text:
On Oct 19, 2008, at 7:50 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of www/pear-HTTP_Client,
>

>

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128221
>

Looks fine to me.
